title: mentha nivea
intro: Mentha nivea, also known as white peppermint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Himalayas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include acting as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha nivea include relief from digestive problems, nausea, and headaches, as well as its ability to freshen breath and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Mentha nivea can be used in teas, infusions, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
